results.resolved_title: The Paracrystalline S-Layer Protein Is Secreted by an ABC Transporter (Type I) Secretion Apparatus
results.quote: Secretion of RsaA to the cell surface relies on an uncleaved C-terminal secretion signal... These components are part of a type I secretion system involving an ABC transporter protein.
results.note: Caulobacter crescentus RsaA S-layer protein, T1SS substrate. Abstract retrieved (full_text empty).

results.resolved_title: The Paracrystalline S-Layer Protein Is Secreted by an ABC Transporter (Type I) Secretion Apparatus
results.note: Methylocystis echinoides homolog. Paper is solely about Caulobacter crescentus RsaA; makes no claim about this organism.

results.resolved_title: The Paracrystalline S-Layer Protein Is Secreted by an ABC Transporter (Type I) Secretion Apparatus
results.note: Nitrosomonas mobilis homolog. Paper is about Caulobacter crescentus RsaA only.

results.resolved_title: The Paracrystalline S-Layer Protein Is Secreted by an ABC Transporter (Type I) Secretion Apparatus
results.note: Phenylobacterium zucineum homolog. Paper is about Caulobacter crescentus RsaA only.

results.note: Rhodospirillum centenum homolog. Paper is about Caulobacter crescentus RsaA only.

results.note: Tepidimonas aquatica homolog. Paper is about Caulobacter crescentus RsaA only.

results.note: Tepidimonas ignava homolog. Paper is about Caulobacter crescentus RsaA only.

results.note: Variibacter gotjawalensis homolog. Paper is about Caulobacter crescentus RsaA only.

results.note: Vreelandella aquamarina homolog. Paper is about Caulobacter crescentus RsaA only.

results.note: Yoonia vestfoldensis homolog. Paper is about Caulobacter crescentus RsaA only.

results.resolved_title: Secretion of cyclolysin, the calmodulin-sensitive adenylate cyclase-haemolysin bifunctional protein of Bordetella pertussis.
results.quote: secretion of B.pertussis adenylate cyclase and haemolysin requires the expression of additional genes. The gene products of cyaB and cyaD are highly similar to HlyB and HlyD
results.note: B. pertussis cyaA (adenylate cyclase-haemolysin) secreted via HlyB/HlyD-like T1SS. Abstract retrieved.

results.resolved_title: Secretion of cyclolysin, the calmodulin-sensitive adenylate cyclase-haemolysin bifunctional protein of Bordetella pertussis.
results.note: Bordetella bronchiseptica entry. Paper's experimental subject is B. pertussis; no claim about B. bronchiseptica cya.

results.resolved_title: Secretion of cyclolysin, the calmodulin-sensitive adenylate cyclase-haemolysin bifunctional protein of Bordetella pertussis.
results.note: Bordetella hinzii homolog. Paper is about B. pertussis adenylate cyclase only.

results.resolved_title: Secretion of cyclolysin, the calmodulin-sensitive adenylate cyclase-haemolysin bifunctional protein of Bordetella pertussis.
results.note: Bordetella parapertussis homolog. Paper is about B. pertussis adenylate cyclase only.

results.resolved_title: A Translocated Effector Required for Bartonella Dissemination from Derma to Blood Safeguards Migratory Host Cells from Damage by Co-translocated Effectors
results.quote: All Beps harbor at their C-terminus a bipartite T4SS signal composed of a BID domain and a positively-charged tail sequence, while only BepD, BepE and BepF
results.note: Bartonella henselae Beps (BepA-G) translocated by VirB T4SS into host cells. Full text retrieved.

results.resolved_title: A Translocated Effector Required for Bartonella Dissemination from Derma to Blood Safeguards Migratory Host Cells from Damage by Co-translocated Effectors
results.quote: the VirB system translocates a cocktail of evolutionarily related effector proteins (Beps) into nucleated host cells. The Beps (named BepA-G)
results.note: Bartonella henselae BepF, a VirB T4SS Bep effector. Full text retrieved.

results.resolved_title: A Translocated Effector Required for Bartonella Dissemination from Derma to Blood Safeguards Migratory Host Cells from Damage by Co-translocated Effectors
results.quote: the VirB system translocates a cocktail of evolutionarily related effector proteins (Beps) into nucleated host cells. The Beps (named BepA-G)
results.note: Bartonella henselae BepG, a VirB T4SS Bep effector. Full text retrieved.

results.resolved_title: Structure of the MacAB-TolC ABC-type tripartite multidrug efflux pump
results.note: Cited paper is the MacAB-TolC efflux pump cryo-EM structure (E. coli). No mention of TseF, PA2374, T6SS, or P. aeruginosa effectors. Full text retrieved.

results.resolved_title: Structure of the MacAB-TolC ABC-type tripartite multidrug efflux pump
results.note: Cited paper is the MacAB-TolC efflux pump structure. No mention of Azu, PA4922, or T6SS. Full text retrieved.

results.resolved_title: The Burkholderia pseudomallei/thailandensis Type VI Secretion System 5: Composition, Regulation and Role in Virulence
results.quote: an envelope spanning membrane complex (TssM, TssL, and TssJ)
results.note: TssM is a structural membrane-complex component of the T6SS apparatus, not a secreted effector. Paper identifies only Hcp-5 and VgrG-5 as T6SS-5 secreted proteins. Full text retrieved.

results.resolved_title: The Burkholderia pseudomallei/thailandensis Type VI Secretion System 5: Composition, Regulation and Role in Virulence
results.quote: the bacteria replicate and employ BimA to facilitate actin tail formation or the flagella fla2 system for intracellular motility
results.note: Paper describes BimA as an actin-tail/motility factor, not a T6SS-secreted effector. No T6SS secretion claim for BimA. Full text retrieved.

results.resolved_title: Protease secretion by Erwinia chrysanthemi. Proteases B and C are synthesized and secreted as zymogens without a signal peptide.
results.quote: The gene encoding the secreted 53-kDa metalloprotease (protease B)... do not have typical signal sequences at their NH2 termini... secreted into the external medium
results.note: Erwinia (Dickeya) chrysanthemi protease B (prtB) secreted without signal peptide = T1SS/ABC-transporter route; homologous to Serratia protease. Abstract retrieved via PMID 2722818.

results.resolved_title: Salmonella induces macrophage death by caspase-1-dependent necrosis
results.note: Cited DOI resolves to Brennan & Cookson 2000 on caspase-1-dependent macrophage necrosis (Salmonella). No mention of SopA or T3SS effectors; subject is host cell death. Confirmed via Crossref title+abstract.

results.resolved_title: AMPylation of Rho GTPases by Vibrio VopS disrupts effector binding and downstream signaling.
results.quote: The Vibrio parahaemolyticus type III effector VopS is implicated in cell rounding and the collapse of the actin cytoskeleton by inhibiting Rho guanosine triphosphatases (GTPases).
results.note: V. parahaemolyticus VopS T3SS effector. Abstract retrieved via PMID 19039103 (DOI not in conversion index).

results.resolved_title: Modulation of Rab GTPase function by a protein phosphocholine transferase
results.note: Cited paper is about Legionella Dot/Icm effectors DrrA and AnkX (Rab1 modification). SidD (lpg2465) is not mentioned or studied. Full text retrieved.

results.resolved_title: Molecular characterization of a leukotoxin gene from a Pasteurella haemolytica-like organism, encoding a new member of the RTX toxin family.
results.quote: A Pasteurella haemolytica-like organism, a new species of bacterium isolated from piglets with diarrhea, secretes a leukotoxin into the culture media.
results.note: pllktA leukotoxin, RTX family (T1SS substrate; C-terminal hydrophobic signal), strain 5943. Abstract retrieved.

results.resolved_title: Identification of a family of Vibrio type III secretion system effectors that contain a conserved serine/threonine kinase domain
results.note: Cited preprint characterizes VopG (VPA1328), a different T3SS2 kinase effector. Title and abstract are exclusively about VopG; VopM (VPA1380) not mentioned. Full text 403; judgment from title+abstract (Crossref).

results.resolved_title: Multiple substrates of the Legionella pneumophila Dot/Icm system identified by interbacterial protein transfer
results.quote: L. pneumophila proteins identified in this study that are translocated between bacterial cells by the Dot/Icm system
results.note: sidH listed in Table 1 (AY504683, 2225 aa) as a Dot/Icm T4SS translocated substrate. Abstract via PubMed; Table 1 confirmed via PMC full-text WebFetch (pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC321768).

results.resolved_title: The Legionella pneumophila effector RavD binds phosphatidylinositol-3-phosphate and helps suppress endolysosomal maturation of the Legionella-containing vacuole
results.quote: the Legionella effector protein RavD targets host membrane compartments... upon translocation into macrophages, RavD was retained onto the Legionella-containing vacuole
results.note: L. pneumophila RavD, Dot/Icm T4SS-translocated effector. Abstract retrieved.

results.resolved_title: A pyocin-like T6SS effector mediates bacterial competition in Yersinia pseudotuberculosis
results.quote: YPK_0952 functions as a T6SS-3-secreted antibacterial effector and that its inherent toxicity is effectively neutralized by the YPK_0953 immune protein.
results.note: Y. pseudotuberculosis YPK_0952 pyocin-like DNase, T6SS-3 secreted effector. Full text retrieved.

results.resolved_title: Pseudomonas aeruginosa T6SS-mediated molybdate transport contributes to bacterial competition during anaerobiosis.
results.quote: the Pseudomonas aeruginosa H2-T6SS mediates molybdate (MoO) acquisition by secretion of a molybdate-binding protein, ModA.
results.note: P. aeruginosa ModA (PA1863) secreted by H2-T6SS. Batch organism field blank; paper is P. aeruginosa. Abstract retrieved via PMID 33852869.

results.resolved_title: The Prodomain of the Bordetella Two-Partner Secretion Pathway Protein FhaB Remains Intracellular yet Affects the Conformation of the Mature C-terminal Domain
results.quote: FHA is initially synthesized as an ~375 kDa preproprotein called FhaB... TpsA family members include adhesins, such as filamentous hemagglutinin (FHA)
results.note: Bordetella FhaB/FHA is a TpsA exoprotein secreted across the OM by the FhaC TpsB two-partner secretion (T5bSS) pathway. Full text retrieved.
